query:
SELECT p.id, p.ticker, p.units, p.entryPrice, p.allocatedCapital, p.status, p.openedAt, p.closedAt,
       t.id as tradeId, t.exitPrice, t.realizedPnl, t.closedAt as tradeClosed, t.exitReason
FROM paperPositions p
LEFT JOIN paperTrades t ON t.positionId = p.id
WHERE p.ticker = 'MTAV.TA' AND p.sessionId = 5;
